name: GCS Bucket Allows Public Write Access
description: Cloud Storage bucket grants write permissions to allUsers or allAuthenticatedUsers
conditions: iam_policy.bindings ANY (members CONTAINS 'allUsers' OR members CONTAINS 'allAuthenticatedUsers') AND role IN ('roles/storage.objectCreator', 'roles/storage.objectAdmin', 'roles/storage.admin')
remediation: Remove public write access immediately. Grant write access only to specific service accounts or users. Enable object versioning for recovery.
